name: Russ Feingold
subject: Where we stand
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
I wanted to give you an update. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42a2/1c469400/56bd858/3564376/43008342/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I wanted to give you an update on where we are. I've just wrapped up visiting all of Wisconsin's 72 counties twice. We've put over 40,000 miles on the campaign van and made 324 stops -- including 9 farms, 27 college campuses, and 34 coffee shops! We're just getting started. In one week, I'm submitting my nomination signatures to officially be on the ballot in November. We're also unveiling our first-ever traveling Campaign HQ -- a 1989 Winnebago that'll be on the road for the next six months delivering yard signs, bumper stickers, and other campaign materials to voters across Wisconsin. We have the momentum and we can win this, but only with your help. I've set an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 online by May 31\. **[Will you join me by making a $5 contribution before the May 31 deadline?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42a2/1c469400/56bd858/3564376/43008342/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42a2/1c469400/56bd858/3564376/43008342/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42a2/1c469400/56bd858/3564376/43008342/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42a2/1c469400/56bd858/3564377/43008342/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42a2/1c469400/56bd858/3564374/43008342/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42a2/1c469400/56bd858/3564375/43008342/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42a2/1c469400/56bd858/3564372/43008342/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
Meanwhile, the opposition is getting nervous. Last week, the Koch brothers announced they'll be spending $30 million on Senate ads this year. They've already run $3 million worth of ads against me, piling on along with my opponent and the other outside groups supporting his campaign. And you and I both know that's only the beginning.
**To date, these 10 groups have run ads against me:**
* National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC)
* The U.S. Chamber of Commerce
* Americans for Prosperity (a Koch-backed group)
* Freedom Partners
* Club for Growth
* Wisconsin Alliance for Reform
* Judicial Crisis Network
* America's PAC
* Restoration PAC
* Let America Work

That list might scare you, but it shouldn't intimidate you -- because we're going to hit our goal of raising $50,000 online, and every dollar will be spent making sure Wisconsin voters know the truth about my campaign and Senator Ron Johnson's record. _The only thing we need is you._
**[Help me take on Senator Johnson and the 10 outside groups supporting him. Make a $5 grassroots contribution to my campaign by the May 31 deadline.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42a2/1c469400/56bd858/3564376/43008342/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema")**
I'm proud of the campaign we're running. And I'll put my grassroots support against Senator Johnson's special interest money any time. Thank you for standing with me every step of the way.
Thanks for all that you're doing,
Russ
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42a2/1c469400/56bd858/3564376/43008342/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-25_may-eom1_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42a2/1c469400/56bd858/3564373/43008342/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42a2/1c469400/56bd858/3564370/43008342/VEsHBw/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/fr-optput"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42a2/1c469400/56bd858/3564371/43008342/VEsHBg/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42a2/1c469400/56bd858/356436e/43008342/VEsHAQ/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
---

PO Box 620061
Middleton, WI 53562

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Want to meet Hillary?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Chat with Hillary about anything! | Friend --

You may not know this, but Hillary loves getting a chance to sit down with the supporters of this campaign. She wants to hear your stories and why this election matters to you and your family.

That’s why before the general election begins, Hillary is setting some time aside to have dinner with a few people on this team. You should be one of them!**[All you have to do is add your name for a chance for you and a guest to win a free trip to meet Hillary for dinner.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Don’t worry, no studying necessary for this dinner -- it will be casual, and you can chat about whatever you like (hint: Hillary loves HGTV!).

**No matter what you talk about, I know Hillary will be thrilled to meet you and thank you for everything you’ve done. Don’t miss this opportunity to join her for a special night out:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks, and good luck!

Huma

Huma Abedin
Vice Chair
Hillary for America
|
**Chip in $1 to join more than 1.2 million grassroots donors standing with this campaign and be automatically entered for the chance to win dinner with Hillary:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 5/20/16 and 5/31/16. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One (1) winner and one (1) guest will receive a special invitation to a campaign dinner event with Hillary Clinton, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the campaign event and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1,900). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU1NzE5NTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzODEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Supreme Court Update
subject: Far too long
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/232006973619437568/5458104363140513792?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scotusja)
---
Friend --

The vacancy on the Supreme Court has gone from a typical GOP stunt to a national emergency. The Court is currently deciding on issues such as women's access to healthcare, laws protecting our environment, and so many others.

Pat Toomey's refusal to even _consider_ President Obama's nominee means these precedent-setting cases could be decided without a full bench.

**We can 't allow such blatant partisan-fueled obstruction. [Add your name and tell Pat Toomey to do his job and give President Obama's nominee a hearing.](https://act.myngp.com/el/232006973619437568/5458104363140513792?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scotusja)**

Simply put, Pat Toomey is refusing to do his constitutional duty and consider the nomination of Judge Merrick Garland. He even bragged that President Obama's nominee **" will be rejected by the Senate"** and admitted to the _Associated Press_ that he doesn't **want to "mislead people into thinking senators are strictly weighing a nominee's qualifications."**

If Senate Republicans get their way, the Supreme Court will likely operate with a vacancy for up to a year -- **a crisis that Pat Toomey called "no big deal."**

**Pennsylvania deserves better than a Senator who will side with Republican leaders like Mitch McConnell over the American people.[Add your name and tell Pat Toomey to do his job and give President Obama's nominee a hearing.](https://act.myngp.com/el/232006973619437568/5458104363140513792?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scotusja)**

Thanks,

Team Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/232006973619437568/5602219551216369664?refcode=e20160525&refcode2=e20160525&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/232006973619437568/5386046769102585856).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Team Bullock
subject: pouring millions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

We've always expected Steve to be outspent in this election. But we didn't know that Greg Gianforte would pour close to half a million dollars into his campaign before Memorial Day.

| [](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=MZez4Gz8vKcc6E0uVK5DHVwAwbWlTdLp)
---

At this pace, he'll dump millions on misleading attacks distorting Steve's record. We all know what Steve has accomplished: record investments in public schools, more Montanans working than ever before and Montana ranked as the most fiscally prudent state in the country to name a few. But if we don't act fast, Greg's money will be able to drown all of that out.

There is yet another campaign reporting deadline where we file with the Commissioner of Political Practices, and it is just three days away.

**[We're $1,454 short of what we need to raise by then. We need you to kick in $15 before our critical pre-primary report.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=JS%2FrpJY2P%2FPKgUyuskFszXvAQUAwWyeJ)**

We've said all along that we don't need to match Greg dollar for dollar -- he's spending unheard of amounts of money on his campaign. Instead, we're relying on supporters like you to pitch in so we have the resources we need to make sure everyone knows all that Steve has done for our state and why it is so critical we reelect him this fall. [**Please kick in $15 so we have the resources we need to win.**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=F0AwkIXkQ7%2FMRLM2R%2FRP1FwAwbWlTdLp)

Thanks,
Team Bullock
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=MXURVP70b%2FLRzCJ%2B3dqt01wAwbWlTdLp)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=iay7B6HQKKMT2UDKS4b8PFwAwbWlTdLp).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: UPDATE (via @HMPAC.com)
subject: they're going to FLIP OUT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC
body:
| We're thrilled, friend.

**As of just a few minutes ago, we were just 12,094 signatures away from our goal for our petition denouncing the GOP 's anti-LGBT agenda.**

But, listen, there is still a gap before we hit our goal.

[Can you click here to automatically add your name before it's too late?](http://act.hmpac.com/page/m/31af5a7e/245102f8/28062df/71332b78/2266552043/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZQVGtWZlEweEpRMHRmVTBsSFRsVlFYMVZTVEZ0emJIVm5QV3huWW5RdFlXZGxibVJoWFNVbCI6InBhZ2Uvb2NzL2xnYnQtYWdlbmRhL2dxZGRnciJ9/ "https://secure.thehousemajoritypac.com/page/ocs/lgbt-agenda/gqddgr?source=em052516&utm_medium=email&utm_source=housemajpac&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+click+here+to+automatically+add+&utm_campaign=em052516_1_s3&refcode=em052516_1_s3&refcode2=em052516_1_s3&subsource=em052516_1_s3")
---

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Make sure you continue to get updates from House Majority PAC by adding democrats@hmpac.com to your address book or approved sender list.

If that is not your preferred email address, [**you can update your information here.**](http://action.thehousemajoritypac.com/page/user/manage?_hid=ojZmJtyrXwPznXeVP8AIj0XuyJU&id=gss3x)
Contributions or gifts to House Majority PAC are not tax deductible.

If you'd like to still get updates from House Majority PAC but less frequently,**click[here](http://act.hmpac.com/page/m/31af5a7e/245102f8/28062df/71332b79/2266552043/VEsE/ "http://action.thehousemajoritypac.com/page/s/get-less-email?source=emftr&utm_medium=email&utm_source=housemajpac&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=em052516_1_s3&refcode=em052516_1_s3&refcode2=em052516_1_s3&subsource=em052516_1_s3") to sign up for 1-2 emails per month.** **[Click here to unsubscribe.](http://act.hmpac.com/page/m/31af5a7e/245102f8/28062df/71332b7a/2266552043/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.thehousemajoritypac.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=housemajpac&utm_content=3+-++Click+here+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em052516_1_s3&source=em052516_1_s3&refcode=em052516_1_s3&refcode2=em052516_1_s3&subsource=em052516_1_s3")**
---
Paid for by House Majority PAC. www.thehousemajoritypac.com. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

clean_body: | We're thrilled, friend. As of just a few minutes ago, we were just 12,094 signatures away from our goal for our petition denouncing the GOP 's anti-LGBT agenda. But, listen, there is still a gap before we hit our goal. ""

name: John Gregg
subject: Meet my running mate Christina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
She's exactly the type of leader Indiana needs as our next lieutenant governor, and the perfect teammate to take this campaign to victory.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8695755337182607360/-586173237641738240?utm_campaign=fnd_meetch_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160525_fnd_gq_meetch_ndn__jg
&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, Today, I'm thrilled to let you know that my friend, State Representative Christina Hale, is joining the campaign as my running mate! In Christina, I've found a partner who shares my commitment to working across the aisle to get things done. She is a consensus builder, a problem solver, and someone who will roll up her sleeves to do the hard work of governing. Christina's exactly the type of leader Indiana needs as our next lieutenant governor, and the perfect teammate to take this campaign to victory. **If you 're as excited as I am to have Christina join the team, chip in $5 or more now.** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**Express Donate: $5 ** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8695755337182607360/-586173237641738240?utm_campaign=fnd_meetch_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160525_fnd_gq_meetch_ndn__jg
&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=5)
---

[**Express Donate: $25 ** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8695755337182607360/-586173237641738240?utm_campaign=fnd_meetch_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160525_fnd_gq_meetch_ndn__jg
&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=25)
---

[**Express Donate: $50 ** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8695755337182607360/-586173237641738240?utm_campaign=fnd_meetch_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160525_fnd_gq_meetch_ndn__jg
&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=50)
---

[**Or, donate another amount** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8695755337182607360/-586173237641738240?utm_campaign=fnd_meetch_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160525_fnd_gq_meetch_ndn__jg
&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
As a state representative, Christina worked with Republican majorities on legislation to support small business, reduce crime, combat sexual assault, lower utility rates and bring attention to the state's water and sewer infrastructure needs.
As a Purdue graduate born in Michigan City, Christina was raised with Hoosier values. And as chief communications officer at global service organization Kiwanis International, she put those values to work, spearheading communications worldwide, developing partnerships with U.S. corporations to increase programming, overseeing offices and staff across the United States, Europe and Asia, and managing budgets in multiple currencies.
Christina's always taken on tough obstacles to achieve big goals, and she and I share an ambitious vision for all Hoosiers to create solid economic opportunities and strong schools, while responsibly addressing the ever-pressing needs of our failing infrastructure and our state's drug and crime problems.
I'm so excited to see Christina lead as our next lieutenant governor. But first, she and I need your help to build a campaign strong enough to win in November.
**[Will you chip in $5 to elect Christina and me this November?]()**
Thanks for your support,
John

| [**Chip in $5 ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8695755337182607360/-586173237641738240?utm_campaign=fnd_meetch_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160525_fnd_gq_meetch_ndn__jg
&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8695755337182607360/-225885267452098560) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8695755337182607360/-153827673414170624)

name: Senator Jeff Merkley, BernieSanders.com
subject: I knew I could count on Bernie
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
When I introduced a bill in the Senate that would slow the effects of climate change, I knew that I could count on Bernie Sanders to stand with me from the very first day.
Last year Bernie and I introduced the _Keep It in the Ground Act_ , which would prevent new fracking, coal mining, and oil drilling on federal lands, as well as all new offshore oil drilling.
**Bernie and I are committed to this fight because we know we can - and must - slow the pace of climate change.** Scientists tell us that we need to keep 80 percent of remaining fossil fuels in the ground to prevent the worst effects of climate change.
[**I knew I could count on Bernie to fight this fight -- can I count on you, too? Add your name to join me and Bernie in supporting the _Keep It in the Ground Act_. Click here to say you support our plan to prevent the worst of climate change's effects.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/keep-it-in-the-ground?source=em160525-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/keep-it-in-the-ground?source=em160525-full")
To stop climate change from destroying our planet, we must act quickly and boldly to bring an end to the extraction and exploitation of fossil fuels in lands owned by the American people.
> Not one more lease to extract coal.
>
> Not one more license for fracking.
>
> Not a single additional offshore oil drilling rig.
We must keep 80 percent of the world's proven reserves in the ground - and the _Keep It in the Ground Act_ is a powerful step toward this goal to avert climate catastrophe.
The fossil fuel industry is geared up for a fight. **The Koch Brothers want us to fail, and we expect heavy resistance from people who profit off of the destruction of our planet.**
Showing tremendous public support will help pass the _Keep It in the Ground Act_ - will you be a partner with me and Bernie in this movement to fight climate change?
[**Click here to show your support for my bill with Bernie Sanders to keep fossil fuels in the ground.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/keep-it-in-the-ground?source=em160525-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/keep-it-in-the-ground?source=em160525-full")
We're building a movement to take on climate change and speed up our transition to clean, renewable energy. We need to act together and we need to act now.
Jeff Merkley
U.S. Senator from Oregon

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie_merkley?refcode=em160525-merkley "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie_merkley?refcode=em160525-merkley")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Add your name to stop LGBTQ discrimination >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd331/2a380d31/13d03f3f/f844ac/3608443405/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd331/2a380d31/13d03f3f/f844ac/3608443405/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Republicans are (YET AGAIN) doing everything they can to discriminate against LGBTQ Americans. Last week, GOP representatives in the House scrambled at the 11th hour to change their votes and allow the House GOP to weaken LGBTQ protections and enable employment discrimination.
**This is just wrong** -- Our laws shouldn't condone discrimination. [**If you agree, sign your name and tell the GOP: Protect LGBTQ Americans from discrimination.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd331/2a380d31/13d03f3f/f844ad/3608443405/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://www.signforgood.com/endLGBTQdiscrimination/?code=Hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-lgbtq-americans-upsell?refcode=lgbt-upsell")
This latest move by Republicans is just the most recent example of GOP anti-LGBTQ policies. From denouncing marriage equality to allowing employment discrimination to so-called "bathroom laws," the GOP has made it clear that they will do everything they can to discriminate against LGBTQ Americans.
Republicans are letting bigotry undermine a central tenet of our democracy -- equal treatment under the law. It has to stop, and it has to stop now. [**Put your name down to say, "no more."**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd331/2a380d31/13d03f3f/f844ad/3608443405/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://www.signforgood.com/endLGBTQdiscrimination/?code=Hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-lgbtq-americans-upsell?refcode=lgbt-upsell")
Thank you for being in this with us,

Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd331/2a380d31/13d03f3f/f844ae/3608443405/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160525_LGBTQ_btn&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd331/2a380d31/13d03f3f/f844af/3608443405/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

Last week, GOP representatives in the House scrambled at the 11th hour to change their votes and allow the House GOP to weaken LGBTQ protections and enable employment discrimination. name: Katie McGinty
subject: You’ve been by my side
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/6239809976043307008/7259825689065422848?refcode=e20160525.2&refcode2=e20160525.2nd&amount=25)
---
Friend --

We've fought hard for every single victory we've secured in this campaign and grassroots supporters like you have been there every step of the way. Now, I'm asking you to step up again to help us meet our ambitious $30,000 end-of-month goal.

[**Will you chip in now? Every dollar counts.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6239809976043307008/7259825689065422848?refcode=e20160525.2&refcode2=e20160525.2nd&amount=25)

Friend, I won't mince words. We're in one of the toughest races in the nation, and Pat Toomey has millions of dollars at his fingertips thanks to his dark money backers. **We cannot afford to give up the momentum we 've gained so far.**

[**Rush $5 or whatever you can now to help keep up our pace.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6239809976043307008/7259825689065422848?refcode=e20160525.2&refcode2=e20160525.2nd&amount=25)

Pat Toomey won't stop coming after us, and with our deadline coming up in under a week, we need to fight back with all of our available resources -- especially the grassroots support of dedicated supporters like you.

My team and I are all in for Pennsylvania. Are you?

[**Pitch in to make sure we have the resources we need to win in November.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6239809976043307008/7259825689065422848?refcode=e20160525.2&refcode2=e20160525.2nd&amount=25)

Thanks for everything you do,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6239809976043307008/7259825689065422848?refcode=e20160525.2&refcode2=e20160525.2nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/6239809976043307008/7187768095027494912).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States
